meta.title: Supply Chain Analytics Services | Optimize & Grow
meta.description: Transform your enterprise supply chain with our advanced supply chain analytics services. Drive cost savings, boost efficiency, and enhance resilience with data-driven insights.

items.text: Simplifying Analysis Services for Supply Chain

Gain real-time visibility into your entire supply chain, save costs by optimizing inventory levels, and mitigate risks by managing supplier disruptions and demand fluctuations using our supply chain data analytics services.

headings.text: Simplifying Analysis Services for Supply Chain

Gain real-time visibility into your entire supply chain, save costs by optimizing inventory levels, and mitigate risks by managing supplier disruptions and demand fluctuations using our supply chain data analytics services.

items.text: Home » Azure Data Analytics » Supply Chain Analytics

paragraphs: Home » Azure Data Analytics » Supply Chain Analytics

items.text: Connecting Data Points Across the Supply Chain For Enhanced Visibility

Our supply chain analytics services consolidate supply chain data from disparate sources, including procurement, inventory, logistics, and supplier management systems, into a single source of truth, enabling you with advanced data analytics and visualization tools, providing intuitive dashboards to monitor key supply chain KPIs.

headings.text: Connecting Data Points Across the Supply Chain For Enhanced Visibility

paragraphs: Our supply chain analytics services consolidate supply chain data from disparate sources, including procurement, inventory, logistics, and supplier management systems, into a single source of truth, enabling you with advanced data analytics and visualization tools, providing intuitive dashboards to monitor key supply chain KPIs.

items.text: Powered by our private labelled analytics solution, Intellifabric, we have built an architecture that provides a headstart to industrial needs for any customized analytics and reporting solution through our Microsoft Fabric services.

paragraphs: Powered by our private labelled analytics solution, Intellifabric, we have built an architecture that provides a headstart to industrial needs for any customized analytics and reporting solution through our Microsoft Fabric services.

items.text: Core Functionality of Our Supply Chain Analytics Solutions and Services
Folio3 has served 20+ years in business, including developing supply chain analytics solutions, helping manufacturers, retailers, and logistics providers turn complex data into strategic insights.
Leverage advanced models to analyze both internal and external factors like sales history, market patterns, weather & economic conditions to foresee highly accurate demands.
Gain real-time insights on pricing trends compared to the competition and contract compliance with our supply chain analytics, saving massive costs in sourcing.
Track supplier performance and their risk scores, including on-time delivery rates and raw material quality metrics.
Leverage predictive analytics to optimize stock levels, accounting for lead times, seasonality, and demand variability.
Identify inefficiencies by analyzing shipping routes, carrier performance, and freight costs, helping you reduce transportation costs through smarter routing.
Improve customer satisfaction by analyzing order cycle times, fulfillment accuracy, and return rates, which highlights gaps causing delays and errors in order fulfillment.
Access vulnerabilities in your supply chain by using predictive analytics for risk scoring, including supplier financial health and geopolitical factors so you can plan in advance.

items.text: Gain Real-Time Visibility Into Your Supply Chains

Leverage our Microsoft Fabric and Power BI dashboards to get a 360° view of your supply chain operations. Monitor procurement spend, warehouse capacity, delivery performance, and demand forecasts in real-time.

headings.text: Gain Real-Time Visibility Into Your Supply Chains

paragraphs: Leverage our Microsoft Fabric and Power BI dashboards to get a 360° view of your supply chain operations. Monitor procurement spend, warehouse capacity, delivery performance, and demand forecasts in real-time.

items.text: Sneak Peek Into Our Inventory Management Dashboards
A glimpse into our interactive dashboards, transforming your distribution and inventory data into actionable insights with real-time visibility and control:
Visualize your inventory levels changes across your entire distribution network, identifying bottlenecks and optimizing operations.
Track real-time inventory quantities and associated Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) to manage stock levels and financial performance effectively.
Understand the precise value of your inventory at any given moment, aiding in financial reporting and strategic planning.
Ensure on-time deliveries and high customer satisfaction by monitoring your Service Level Agreement (SLA) performance for shipping.

headings.text: Sneak Peek Into Our Inventory Management Dashboards

paragraphs: A glimpse into our interactive dashboards, transforming your distribution and inventory data into actionable insights with real-time visibility and control:

items.text: Our Professional Supply Chain Analytics Services

Folio3’s project management prowess allows us to deliver projects on time regardless of time and budget constraints, helping businesses design, implement, and modernize supply chain analytics solutions for effective decision making in supply chain planning and optimization.

Our supply chain analytics consulting assesses your existing supply chain processes, highlights vulnerabilities, and defines a roadmap for implementation of a robust supply chain analytics solution so you can reap maximum ROI, whether in procurement, logistics, or inventory optimization.

Our supply chain analytics implementation involves deploying a scalable, cloud-based analytics platform integrated with ERP and IoT to capture data from all aspects of your supply chain, manage data storage, analytics, and then visualize the reports powered by Power BI and Microsoft Fabric.

items.text: Key Benefits of Supply Chain Analytics Solution
Leveraging our supply chain analytics services offers a range of benefits for your business:
Build robust frameworks for risk prediction and mitigation, transforming potential disruptions into strategic opportunities.
An all-in-one centralized reporting solution tracking every aspect of your supply chain, from raw materials sourcing to last-mile delivery.
Significantly improve customer satisfaction by providing exceptional customer service, reduce waste across operations, and optimize resource utilization for maximum returns.
Implement AI-powered supply chain analytics solutions for continuous improvement and adaptability in a rapidly changing market.

items.text: Why Choose Folio3 For Supply Chain Analytics Services

We are one of the Microsoft Gold and solution partners, with deep knowledge of Microsoft Azure and the Fabric ecosystem, making us the best choice for your supply chain analytics services providers. Here’s why our clients trust us:
Knowledge of All Aspects of the Value Chain

Our in-depth knowledge of every segment of the supply chain, including procurement, manufacturing, distribution, and customer delivery, ensures holistic and effective supply chain analytic consulting services.
We employ next-gen AI and ML capabilities to deliver predictive and prescriptive insights within your supply chain analytics software, empowering you with smarter decisions.
Our pre-built supply chain analytics dashboards offer real-time insights with customizable views, making critical supply chain data analytics accessible for you.
We tailor the supply chain analytics solutions to meet your specific business needs, which are designed to scale with your growth, setting you up for long-term relevancy.
We cover every stage of your analytics journey, from initial supply chain analytics consulting and conceptualization to development, seamless integration, and ongoing support.
Our solutions address your strategic business objectives and cater to your pressing pain points, ensuring a measurable return on investment.
